CHIEF OF LA FERIA POLICE DEPARTMENT REPORTS ONE FOOT TO ONE AND A HALF FEET OF FLOODWATER ON CANAL STREET IN LA FERIA.

SHIP CAPTAIN REPORTED TORNADO TOUCHDOWN BETWEEN LAGUNA HEIGHTS AND LAGUNA VISTA ON HWY 100. COULD SEE DEBRIS FROM FIELD BEING PULLED INTO TORNADO. NO BUILDINGS/STRUCTURES WERE AFFECTED. POSSIBLY A WATERSPOUT THAT MOVED ONSHORE.

THE PUBLIC REPORTED A LANDFALLING WATER SPOUT MOVING ASHORE NEAR LAGUNA HEIGHTS. THE SAME PUBLIC REPORTED DEBRIS BEING PULLED INTO THE LANDFALLING SPOUT IN A FIELD JUST WEST OF LAGUNA HEIGHTS ALONG HWY 100. ANOTHER REPORT WAS RECEIVED BY A SECOND INDIVIDUAL WHO REPORTED POWER LINES DOWNED BY A LANDFALLING WATER SPOUT IN FRONT OF BAYSIDE MANOR AT HWY 100 AND ROY STREET IN LAGUNA HEIGHTS.
